name: api-security-scanner
description: Automated API security testing tool with FastAPI backend and ReactTS frontend

scripts.clean: docker compose -f dev.compose.yml down -v && docker compose -f compose.yml down -v
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean && docker system prune -af --volumes
scripts.backend:setup: cd backend && uv venv && uv sync --all-extras
scripts.backend:reinstall: cd backend && uv lock --upgrade && uv sync --all-extras
scripts.backend:check: cd backend && uv run ruff check .
scripts.backend:fix: cd backend && uv run ruff check . --fix
scripts.backend:format: cd backend && uv run yapf -i -r -vv models/ repositories/ schemas/ scanners/ core/ factory/
scripts.backend:qa: npm run backend:check && npm run backend:typecheck
scripts.backend:update: cd backend && uv lock --upgrade && uv sync --all-extras

author: https://github.com/CarterPerez-dev
